scenarios.title: Plan has architecture gaps
scenarios.prompt: Review this plan: add webhook retries, improve the delivery dashboard, and make the worker more reliable. It should be easy to implement.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Says the plan looks reasonable but does not force decisions on retry policy, failure handling, or dashboard behavior.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Lists the missing decisions, explains why they block implementation, and rewrites the plan with explicit interfaces, failure modes, and test coverage.

scenarios.title: Mixed frontend and backend scope gets made decision-complete
scenarios.prompt: We need a new settings page, role-based controls, and audit logs. Please review the plan before anyone codes it.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Reviews at a high level and misses UX states, permission boundaries, and rollout concerns.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Produces findings across scope, UX, data flow, and compatibility, then returns a revised plan with acceptance criteria.

scenarios.title: Default mode review should route into Plan Mode
scenarios.prompt: Use jy-plan-review on this rough plan, but I am still in Default mode.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Acts like it can do the full interactive plan-closing workflow without acknowledging the current mode.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Calls out that the task belongs in Plan Mode, tells the user to use Shift+Tab, and still leaves the top findings plus a compact draft revised plan.
